nodes.title: SentinelAI
nodes.description: Plataforma NMS full-stack: discovery Nmap/SNMP, topologia 2D/3D, monitoramento, alertas e inventário persistente.
nodes.code:
![SentinelAI — Network Monitoring Platform](docs/assets/sentinelai-hero.png) # SentinelAI **Plataforma NMS full-stack** — discovery inteligente, topologia 2D/3D, monitoramento, alertas multicanal e inventário persistente. [![FastAPI](https://img.shields.io/badge/FastAPI-009688?style=for-the-badge&logo=fastapi&logoColor=white)](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/) [![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-20232A?style=for-the-badge&logo=react&logoColor=61DAFB)](https://react.dev/) [![Celery](https://img.shields.io/badge/Celery-37814A?style=for-the-badge&logo=celery&logoColor=white)](https://docs.celeryq.dev/) [![PostgreSQL](https://img.shields.io/badge/PostgreSQL-316192?style=for-the-badge&logo=postgresql&logoColor=white)](https://www.postgresql.org/) [![Docker](https://img.shields.io/badge/Docker-2496ED?style=for-the-badge&logo=docker&logoColor=white)](https://www.docker.com/) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Proprietary-red?style=for-the-badge)](#licença) [Quick Start](#-quick-start) · [Árvore do Conhecimento](https://canonengineer.github.io/TreeofKnowledge/) · [Arquitetura](#-arquitetura) · [Discovery](#-discovery-engine) · [API](#-api) · [Roadmap](#-roadmap)
--- ## O que é **SentinelAI** é uma plataforma de **monitoramento e inventário de infraestrutura de rede** pensada para equipes de engenharia e NOC. Combina: - Scan de sub-rede com **Nmap configurável** (perfis quick → aggressive) - Inventário **ativo + inativo** em sub-rede completa (`/24`) - **Mapa de topologia** interativo (React Flow) com vista **3D** - Monitoramento **ping / HTTP / SNMP**, alertas multicanal e relatórios - **19 fases** de evolução enterprise (multi-tenant, observability, billing, Copilot…) --- ## Quick Start ### Pré-requisitos - [Docker Desktop](https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop/) - Docker Compose v2 ### Subir em 3 comandos ```bash git clone https://github.com/CanonEngineer/SentinelAI.git cd SentinelAI cp .env.example .env && docker compose up --build -d ``` ### Acessar | Serviço | URL | Credenciais | |---------|-----|-------------| | **Frontend** | http://localhost:5173 | `admin` / `admin123` | | **API + Swagger** | http://localhost:8000/docs | JWT após login | | **PostgreSQL** | `localhost:5432` | ver `.env.example` | | **Redis** | `localhost:6379` | — | ### Primeiro scan 1. Login no dashboard 2. Informe a sub-rede (ex: `172.20.100.0/24`) 3. Escolha perfil **Padrão** (nmap + SNMP + inventário full subnet) 4. Clique **Escanear sub-rede** 5. Acompanhe **Total · Ativos · Inativos** em tempo real --- ## Árvore do Conhecimento Mapa **2D e 3D** deste projeto (balões, modal de código, Galaxy) está no hub central: **[canonengineer.github.io/TreeofKnowledge](https://canonengineer.github.io/TreeofKnowledge/)** → selecione **SentinelAI** --- ## Arquitetura ### Visão geral (C4 — Container) ```mermaid flowchart TB subgraph Clients WEB[React SPA :5173] MOB[Expo Mobile] DESK[Electron Desktop] end subgraph Platform["SentinelAI Platform"] API[FastAPI :8000] FE[Vite Frontend] CW[Celery Worker] DW[Discovery Worker] BEAT[Celery Beat] end subgraph Data PG[(PostgreSQL 16)] RD[(Redis 7)] end subgraph External NM[Nmap / ICMP] SNMP[SNMP Agents] LDAP[LDAP / AD] end WEB --> FE --> API MOB --> API DESK --> FE API --> PG API --> RD CW --> PG DW --> PG DW --> RD BEAT --> RD DW --> NM DW --> SNMP API --> LDAP ``` ### Stack tecnológica | Camada | Tecnologias | |--------|-------------| | **Frontend** | React 18, Vite, TypeScript, React Flow, Lucide | | **Backend** | FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2, Pydantic v2, Alembic | | **Async** | Celery, Redis, filas `celery` + `discovery` | | **Discovery** | Nmap, python-nmap, SNMP (pysnmp), ICMP ping | | **Data** | PostgreSQL, JSONB (scan_options, extra_data) | | **Deploy** | Docker Compose, Helm, GitHub Actions CI | | **Observability** | Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry (opcional) | --- ## Discovery Engine ![Pipeline de Discovery](docs/assets/discovery-pipeline.png) ### Pipeline de scan ```mermaid flowchart LR A[POST /api/discovery] --> B{Job #1–100} B --> C[Celery discovery-worker] C --> D[Nmap / ICMP ping] D --> E[Hosts vivos] E --> F{Inventário} F --> G[SNMP + DNS enrich] F --> H[Marcar inativos] G --> I[(devices)] H --> I I --> J[Job completed] J --> K[UI: Total · Ativos · Inativos] ``` ### Perfis de scan | Perfil | Nmap | SNMP | Inventário /24 | |--------|------|------|----------------| | **Rápido** | Ping + top ports | Opcional | Não | | **Padrão** | SYN + scripts | Sim | Sim (ativos + inativos) | | **Profundo** | OS + UDP | Sim | Sim | | **Agressivo** | Timing T4/T5 | Sim | Sim | | **Personalizado** | UI avançada | Configurável | Configurável | ### Ciclo de jobs Os jobs de discovery usam IDs **#1 a #100**. Ao concluir o **#100**, o próximo scan reinicia em **#1** (histórico limpo, sequência resetada). --- ## Topologia 2D & 3D ```mermaid flowchart TB subgraph Map2D["Mapa 2D — React Flow"] RF[Nodes + Edges] LLDP[LLDP/CDP auto] MAN[Links manuais] ELK[Auto-layout ELK] EXP[Export PNG/SVG/PDF/VSDX] end subgraph Map3D["Mapa 3D — Map3DView"] CSS[CSS 3D transforms] H[Altura por status] TRF[Tráfego animado] end TOPO[topology_service] --> Map2D TOPO --> Map3D SNMP2[SNMP counters] --> TRF ``` - **2D**: editor completo estilo *The Dude++* — drag-drop, camadas, grupos, colaboração WebSocket - **3D**: projeção com altura por status (`active` / `inactive`) e links com tráfego SNMP --- ## Monitoramento & Alertas ```mermaid flowchart LR DEV[Devices] --> MON[Monitors] MON --> PING[ICMP Ping] MON --> HTTP[HTTP/HTTPS] MON --> TCP[TCP Port] MON --> SNMP2[SNMP Poll] PING & HTTP & TCP & SNMP2 --> MET[(metrics)] MET --> ANO[Anomaly AI] MET --> ALT[Alert Engine] ALT --> EM[Email] ALT --> TG[Telegram] ALT --> SL[Slack] ALT --> DC[Discord] ALT --> TM[Teams] ALT --> WH[Webhook] ``` --- ## Estrutura do repositório ``` SentinelAI/ ├── backend/app/ │ ├── api/routes/ # REST + WebSocket │ ├── engines/ │ │ ├── discovery/ # Nmap, SNMP, scan_options, subnet_scanner │ │ ├── monitor/ # Ping, HTTP, TCP │ │ ├── alerts/ # Multicanal │ │ ├── ai/ # Anomalias, Copilot, vision │ │ └── reporting/ # PDF, Excel, VSDX │ ├── models/ # SQLAlchemy ORM │ ├── services/ # Regras de negócio │ └── workers/ # Celery tasks ├── frontend/src/ │ ├── pages/ # Dashboard, TopologyMap, Alerts… │ ├── components/ # Discovery, Map3D, charts │ └── api/ # Cliente HTTP tipado ├── docs/ │ ├── assets/ # Ilustrações README │ └── PHASE-*-ROADMAP.md ├── deploy/helm/ # Kubernetes ├── mobile/ # React Native (Expo) ├── docker-compose.yml └── .github/workflows/ci.yml ``` --- ## API Documentação interativa: **http://localhost:8000/docs** | Endpoint | Descrição | |----------|-----------| | `POST /api/auth/login` | JWT | | `GET/POST /api/discovery` | Jobs de scan | | `GET /api/discovery/scan-defaults` | Perfis e limites | | `GET/POST /api/devices` | Inventário | | `GET /api/topology/graph` | Grafo 2D/3D | | `GET /api/events` | Timeline | | `GET /health` | Health check | --- ## Desenvolvimento local ### Backend ```bash cd backend python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\activate # Windows pip install -r requirements.txt uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000 ``` ### Frontend ```bash cd frontend npm install && npm run dev ``` ### Workers ```bash cd backend celery -A app.workers.celery_app worker -Q celery,discovery -l info ``` --- ## Configuração Copie `.env.example` → `.env`. Principais variáveis: ```env # Discovery SNMP_COMMUNITY=public DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_SUBNETS=192.168.1.0/24 DISCOVERY_JOBS_MAX_ID=100 # Alertas ALERT_CHANNELS_ENABLED=email,telegram,slack,webhook # LDAP (opcional) LDAP_ENABLED=false ``` --- ## Roadmap
Fases 0–10 — Core → Enterprise - Fase 0/1: MVP — API, JWT, ping, discovery ICMP - Fase 4: SNMP, inventário persistente, asset history - Fase 5: HTTP/TCP monitors, SLA, RBAC - Fase 6–8: Map Editor, colaboração WS, 3D, VSDX, tráfego animado - Fase 9–10: Sites, NetFlow, multi-tenant, plugins, SNMP traps → [PHASE-10-ROADMAP.md](docs/PHASE-10-ROADMAP.md)
Fases 11–19 — Plataforma → Scale - Marketplace, HA, Electron, PWA, CI/CD - Prometheus/Grafana, Helm, OpenTelemetry - Vault, service mesh, SOC2, Copilot LLM - Stripe billing, self-healing, map vision, CDN → [PHASE-19-ROADMAP.md](docs/PHASE-19-ROADMAP.md) · [MAP-EDITOR-ROADMAP.md](docs/MAP-EDITOR-ROADMAP.md)
--- ## Contribuindo 1. Fork → branch → PR 2. Siga o padrão existente (FastAPI services + React components) 3. Não commite `.env` — use `.env.example` 4. CI: `.github/workflows/ci.yml` --- ## Licença Projeto proprietário — **CanonEngineer / SentinelAI**. Uso interno ou conforme acordo de licença. ---
**SentinelAI** — *Observe. Discover. Map.* [GitHub](https://github.com/CanonEngineer/SentinelAI) · [Tree of Knowledge](https://canonengineer.github.io/TreeofKnowledge/)

nodes.title: Arquitetura C4
nodes.description: Frontend React + FastAPI + Celery + PostgreSQL + Redis.
nodes.code:
services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-sentinel}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-sentinel_secret}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-sentinelai}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-sentinel} -d ${POSTGRES_DB:-sentinelai}"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 5

  api:
    build:
      context: ./backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    command: uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
    env_file:
      - .env
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://sentinel:sentinel_secret@postgres:5432/sentinelai
      DATABASE_URL_SYNC: postgresql://sentinel:sentinel_secret@postgres:5432/sentinelai
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/app
      - reports_data:/app/reports
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
      - "2055:2055/udp"
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "python -c \"import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8000/health')\""]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 15s
    cap_add:
      - NET_RAW

  worker:
    build:
      context: ./backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    command: celery -A app.workers.celery_app worker --loglevel=info --concurrency=4 -Q celery
    env_file:
      - .env
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://sentinel:sentinel_secret@postgres:5432/sentinelai
      DATABASE_URL_SYNC: postgresql://sentinel:sentinel_secret@postgres:5432/sentinelai
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/app
      - reports_data:/app/reports
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    cap_add:
      - NET_RAW

  discovery-worker:
    build:
      context: ./backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    command: celery -A app.workers.celery_app worker --loglevel=info --concurrency=2 -Q discovery
    env_file:
      - .env
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://sentinel:sentinel_secret@postgres:5432/sentinelai
      DATABASE_URL_SYNC: postgresql://sentinel:sentinel_secret@postgres:5432/sentinelai
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/app
      - reports_data:/app/reports
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    cap_add:
      - NET_RAW

  beat:
    build:
      context: ./backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    command: celery -A app.workers.celery_app beat --loglevel=info
    env_file:
      - .env
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://sentinel:sentinel_secret@postgres:5432/sentinelai
      DATABASE_URL_SYNC: postgresql://sentinel:sentinel_secret@postgres:5432/sentinelai
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379/0
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/app
    depends_on:
      - worker
      - redis

  frontend:
    build:
      context: ./frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    command: sh -c "rm -rf node_modules/.vite && npm install && npm run dev"
    ports:
      - "5173:5173"
    volumes:
      - ./frontend:/app
      - /app/node_modules
    environment:
      # Vazio = browser usa /api via proxy Vite (mesma origem, sem CORS, reconecta após restart da API)
      VITE_API_URL: ""
    depends_on:
      api:
        condition: service_healthy

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  reports_data:

nodes.title: API Discovery
nodes.description: Jobs assíncronos de scan, perfis nmap, stop e listagem.
nodes.code:
import time

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status
from sqlalchemy import select
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession

from app.config import settings
from app.database import get_db
from app.dependencies import require_operator, require_viewer
from app.engines.discovery.dns_resolver import iter_host_addresses, validate_subnet
from app.models import DiscoveryJob, DiscoveryJobStatus, User
from app.engines.discovery.scan_options import list_scan_defaults, resolve_scan_options
from app.schemas.discovery import (
    DiscoveryJobCreate,
    DiscoveryJobResponse,
    ScanDefaultsResponse,
)
from app.services.discovery_service import (
    cycle_discovery_job_ids_if_needed,
    fail_stuck_pending_discovery_jobs,
    fail_orphaned_discovery_jobs,
    fail_stale_discovery_jobs,
    has_active_discovery_job,
    prune_discovery_jobs,
    reconcile_cancelled_discovery_jobs,
    stop_discovery_job,
)
from app.workers.discovery_tasks import run_discovery_job

router = APIRouter()

MAX_JOBS = settings.discovery_jobs_max_history
_RECONCILE_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 30.0
_last_reconcile_monotonic = 0.0


def _maybe_reconcile_discovery_jobs() -> None:
    """Reconcilia jobs órfãos/stale no máximo a cada 30s (evita esgotar pool no polling)."""
    global _last_reconcile_monotonic
    now = time.monotonic()
    if now - _last_reconcile_monotonic < _RECONCILE_INTERVAL_SECONDS:
        return
    _last_reconcile_monotonic = now

    from app.db_sync import SyncSession

    with SyncSession() as session:
        stale = fail_stale_discovery_jobs(session)
        stuck = fail_stuck_pending_discovery_jobs(session)
        orphaned = fail_orphaned_discovery_jobs(session)
        reconciled = reconcile_cancelled_discovery_jobs(session)
        if stale or stuck or orphaned or reconciled:
            session.commit()


@router.get("", response_model=list[DiscoveryJobResponse])
async def list_discovery_jobs(
    limit: int = MAX_JOBS,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _: User = Depends(require_viewer),
):
    cap = min(max(limit, 1), MAX_JOBS)

    _maybe_reconcile_discovery_jobs()

    result = await db.execute(
        select(DiscoveryJob).order_by(DiscoveryJob.created_at.desc()).limit(cap)
    )
    return result.scalars().all()


@router.get("/scan-defaults", response_model=ScanDefaultsResponse)
async def get_scan_defaults(_: User = Depends(require_viewer)):
    return list_scan_defaults()


def _build_scan_options_payload(payload: DiscoveryJobCreate) -> dict:
    if payload.scan_options:
        opts = payload.scan_options.model_dump(exclude_none=True)
    else:
        opts = {"profile": "standard"}

    if payload.scan_options is None or payload.scan_options.use_snmp is None:
        opts["use_snmp"] = payload.use_snmp
    community = payload.snmp_community or opts.get("snmp_community")
    if community:
        opts["snmp_community"] = community
    return opts


@router.post("", response_model=DiscoveryJobResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_202_ACCEPTED)
async def start_discovery(
    payload: DiscoveryJobCreate,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _: User = Depends(require_operator),
):
    try:
        validate_subnet(payload.subnet)
    except ValueError as exc:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, detail=str(exc)) from exc

    from app.db_sync import SyncSession

    with SyncSession() as session:
        if has_active_discovery_job(session):
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT,
                detail="Já existe um scan em andamento. Cancele-o antes de iniciar outro.",
            )
        cycle_discovery_job_ids_if_needed(session)
        session.commit()

    scan_opts_dict = _build_scan_options_payload(payload)
    resolved = resolve_scan_options(
        scan_opts_dict,
        snmp_community_fallback=payload.snmp_community or settings.snmp_community,
    )

    job = DiscoveryJob(
        subnet=payload.subnet,
        use_snmp=resolved.use_snmp,
        snmp_community=resolved.snmp_community,
        scan_options=scan_opts_dict,
        status=DiscoveryJobStatus.PENDING,
        progress_percent=0,
        progress_label=f"Aguardando worker · perfil {resolved.label}",
        hosts_processed=0,
        devices_found=0,
        devices_inactive=0,
        total_hosts=len(iter_host_addresses(payload.subnet)),
    )
    db.add(job)
    await db.flush()

    async_result = run_discovery_job.apply_async(args=[job.id], queue="discovery", priority=9)
    job.celery_task_id = async_result.id
    await db.commit()
    await db.refresh(job)

    with SyncSession() as session:
        prune_discovery_jobs(session, keep=MAX_JOBS)
        session.commit()

    return job


@router.post("/{job_id}/stop", response_model=DiscoveryJobResponse)
async def stop_discovery(
    job_id: int,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _: User = Depends(require_operator),
):
    job = await db.get(DiscoveryJob, job_id)
    if not job:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Job não encontrado")

    if job.status in (DiscoveryJobStatus.COMPLETED, DiscoveryJobStatus.FAILED):
        return job

    from app.db_sync import SyncSession

    with SyncSession() as session:
        sync_job = session.get(DiscoveryJob, job_id)
        if not sync_job:
            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Job não encontrado")
        stop_discovery_job(session, sync_job)
        session.commit()
        session.refresh(sync_job)
        response = DiscoveryJobResponse.model_validate(sync_job)

    return response


@router.get("/{job_id}", response_model=DiscoveryJobResponse)
async def get_discovery_job(
    job_id: int,
    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
    _: User = Depends(require_viewer),
):
    job = await db.get(DiscoveryJob, job_id)
    if not job:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="Job não encontrado")
    return job

nodes.title: discovery_tasks.py
nodes.description: Worker Celery: nmap → inventário → progresso em tempo real.
nodes.code:
from datetime import UTC, datetime

from app.engines.discovery.nmap_scanner import (
    ScanCancelledError,
    ScanTimeoutError,
    nmap_available,
    scan_subnet_nmap,
)
from app.engines.discovery.subnet_scanner import scan_subnet
from app.engines.discovery.discovery_progress import NMAP_MAX_PERCENT
from app.engines.discovery.dns_resolver import iter_host_addresses
from app.engines.discovery.scan_options import resolve_scan_options
from app.models import Device, DeviceStatus, DiscoveryJob, DiscoveryJobStatus, Metric, Monitor, MonitorType
from app.engines.discovery.snmp_collector import collect_snmp_info
from app.services.discovery_service import is_job_cancelled
from app.services.inventory_service import process_discovery_results
from app.services.traffic_service import sync_link_traffic, update_device_interface_counters
from app.workers.celery_app import celery_app
from app.db_sync import SyncSession
from sqlalchemy import select
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session


def _update_job_progress(
    session: Session,
    job: DiscoveryJob,
    percent: int,
    label: str,
    *,
    hosts_processed: int | None = None,
    devices_found: int | None = None,
    devices_inactive: int | None = None,
) -> None:
    session.expire(job)
    if job.cancel_requested or job.status != DiscoveryJobStatus.RUNNING:
        raise ScanCancelledError("Scan cancelado pelo usuário")

    job.progress_percent = min(100, max(0, percent))
    job.progress_label = label
    if hosts_processed is not None:
        job.hosts_processed = hosts_processed
    if devices_found is not None:
        job.devices_found = devices_found
    if devices_inactive is not None:
        job.devices_inactive = devices_inactive
    session.commit()


def _ensure_job_still_running(session: Session, job: DiscoveryJob) -> None:
    session.expire(job)
    if job.cancel_requested or job.status != DiscoveryJobStatus.RUNNING:
        raise ScanCancelledError("Scan cancelado pelo usuário")


def _fail_job(session: Session, job: DiscoveryJob, message: str, *, cancelled: bool = False) -> None:
    job.status = DiscoveryJobStatus.FAILED
    job.error_message = message
    job.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)
    job.progress_label = "Scan cancelado" if cancelled else "Scan falhou"
    session.commit()


@celery_app.task(
    name="app.workers.discovery_tasks.run_discovery_job",
    bind=True,
    time_limit=3600,
    soft_time_limit=3300,
)
def run_discovery_job(self, job_id: int) -> dict:
    import asyncio

    from app.config import settings

    with SyncSession() as session:
        job = session.get(DiscoveryJob, job_id)
        if not job:
            return {"error": "job not found"}

        if job.cancel_requested:
            _fail_job(session, job, "Scan cancelado pelo usuário", cancelled=True)
            return {"job_id": job_id, "cancelled": True}

        job.status = DiscoveryJobStatus.RUNNING
        job.started_at = datetime.now(UTC)
        job.progress_percent = 0
        job.progress_label = "Iniciando scan..."
        job.hosts_processed = 0
        job.devices_found = 0
        job.devices_inactive = 0
        job.total_hosts = len(iter_host_addresses(job.subnet))
        job.celery_task_id = self.request.id
        session.commit()

        def should_cancel() -> bool:
            session.expire(job)
            return is_job_cancelled(session, job_id)

        try:
            scan_opts = resolve_scan_options(
                job.scan_options,
                snmp_community_fallback=job.snmp_community or settings.snmp_community,
            )
            job.use_snmp = scan_opts.use_snmp
            alive_hosts: list[str]
            nmap_hosts = {}
            scan_errors: list[str] = []

            if nmap_available():
                def nmap_progress(percent: int, label: str) -> None:
                    _update_job_progress(session, job, percent, label)

                nmap_result = scan_subnet_nmap(
                    job.subnet,
                    scan_options=scan_opts,
                    on_progress=nmap_progress,
                    should_cancel=should_cancel,
                )
                alive_hosts = nmap_result.alive_hosts
                nmap_hosts = nmap_result.hosts
                job.total_hosts = nmap_result.total_hosts
                scan_errors = nmap_result.errors
            else:
                def ping_progress(percent: int, label: str) -> None:
                    _update_job_progress(session, job, percent, label)

                scan_result = asyncio.run(scan_subnet(job.subnet, on_progress=ping_progress))
                alive_hosts = scan_result.alive_hosts
                job.total_hosts = scan_result.total_hosts
                scan_errors = scan_result.errors
                scan_errors.insert(0, "nmap indisponível — fallback para ping ICMP")

            if should_cancel():
                raise ScanCancelledError("Scan cancelado pelo usuário")

            max_inv = scan_opts.max_inventory_hosts
            if not scan_opts.inventory_full_subnet and len(alive_hosts) > max_inv:
                scan_errors.append(
                    f"Inventário limitado a {max_inv} hosts (de {len(alive_hosts)} detectados)"
                )
                alive_hosts = alive_hosts[:max_inv]

            job.devices_found = len(alive_hosts)
            inv_label = (
                f"{len(alive_hosts)} ativos · inventário sub-rede completa ({scan_opts.label})"
                if scan_opts.inventory_full_subnet
                else f"{len(alive_hosts)} hosts · inventário ({scan_opts.label})"
            )
            _update_job_progress(
                session,
                job,
                NMAP_MAX_PERCENT,
                f"Descoberta concluída · {inv_label}",
                devices_found=len(alive_hosts),
            )

            def inventory_progress(percent: int, label: str, processed: int, inactive: int) -> None:
                _update_job_progress(
                    session,
                    job,
                    percent,
                    label,
                    hosts_processed=processed,
                    devices_inactive=inactive,
                )

            inventory = process_discovery_results(
                session,
                subnet=job.subnet,
                alive_hosts=alive_hosts,
                use_snmp=scan_opts.use_snmp,
                snmp_community=scan_opts.snmp_community,
                on_progress=inventory_progress,
                nmap_hosts=nmap_hosts,
                should_cancel=should_cancel,
                scan_options=scan_opts,
            )

            _ensure_job_still_running(session, job)

            job.devices_found = inventory.devices_found
            job.devices_inactive = inventory.devices_inactive
            job.devices_new = inventory.devices_new
            job.devices_updated = inventory.devices_updated
            job.status = DiscoveryJobStatus.COMPLETED
            job.completed_at = datetime.now(UTC)
            job.progress_percent = 100
            job.progress_label = "Scan concluído"
            job.hosts_processed = inventory.subnet_ips_total or len(alive_hosts)
            if scan_errors:
                job.error_message = "; ".join(scan_errors[:5])
            if inventory.devices_inactive:
                extra = f"{inventory.devices_inactive} IPs marcados inativos"
                job.error_message = f"{job.error_message}; {extra}" if job.error_message else extra
            session.commit()

            return {
                "job_id": job_id,
                "subnet": job.subnet,
                "devices_found": job.devices_found,
                "devices_new": job.devices_new,
                "devices_updated": job.devices_updated,
            }
        except ScanCancelledError:
            _fail_job(session, job, "Scan cancelado pelo usuário", cancelled=True)
            return {"job_id": job_id, "cancelled": True}
        except ScanTimeoutError as exc:
            _fail_job(session, job, str(exc))
            return {"job_id": job_id, "error": str(exc)}
        except Exception as exc:
            _fail_job(session, job, str(exc))
            raise


@celery_app.task(name="app.workers.discovery_tasks.run_snmp_poll")
def run_snmp_poll() -> dict:
    with SyncSession() as session:
        devices = session.execute(select(Device).where(Device.status == DeviceStatus.ACTIVE)).scalars().all()
        polled = 0

        for device in devices:
            snmp_info = collect_snmp_info(device.ip_address)
            if not snmp_info.reachable:
                continue

            monitor = session.execute(
                select(Monitor).where(Monitor.device_id == device.id, Monitor.monitor_type == MonitorType.SNMP)
            ).scalar_one_or_none()
            if not monitor:
                monitor = Monitor(
                    device_id=device.id,
                    monitor_type=MonitorType.SNMP,
                    target=device.ip_address,
                    interval_seconds=300,
                    is_enabled=True,
                )
                session.add(monitor)
                session.flush()

            if snmp_info.cpu_load is not None:
                session.add(
                    Metric(
                        device_id=device.id,
                        monitor_id=monitor.id,
                        metric_name="cpu_load",
                        value=snmp_info.cpu_load,
                        unit="percent",
                    )
                )

            if snmp_info.interface_count is not None:
                session.add(
                    Metric(
                        device_id=device.id,
                        monitor_id=monitor.id,
                        metric_name="interface_count",
                        value=float(snmp_info.interface_count),
                        unit="count",
                    )
                )

            if snmp_info.interfaces:
                update_device_interface_counters(device, snmp_info.interfaces)

            from app.services.inventory_service import apply_field_update_sync, merge_extra_data, record_device_change_sync

            for field_name, value in (
                ("hostname", snmp_info.sys_name),
                ("mac_address", snmp_info.mac_address),
                ("vendor", snmp_info.vendor),
                ("model", snmp_info.model),
                ("os_name", snmp_info.sys_descr),
            ):
                if value:
                    apply_field_update_sync(session, device, field_name, value)

            if snmp_info.mac_address and not device.vendor:
                from app.engines.discovery.oui import lookup_vendor

                vendor = lookup_vendor(snmp_info.mac_address)
                if vendor:
                    apply_field_update_sync(session, device, "vendor", vendor)

            if snmp_info.sys_descr:
                from app.engines.discovery.snmp_collector import infer_device_type

                device_type = infer_device_type(snmp_info.sys_descr)
                if device_type:
                    apply_field_update_sync(session, device, "device_type", device_type)

            extra = merge_extra_data(
                device.extra_data,
                {
                    "snmp": {
                        "sys_location": snmp_info.sys_location,
                        "sys_uptime": snmp_info.sys_uptime,
                        "interface_count": snmp_info.interface_count,
                        "cpu_load": snmp_info.cpu_load,
                        "cpu_loads": snmp_info.cpu_loads,
                        "interfaces": snmp_info.interfaces,
                    }
                },
            )
            if extra != (device.extra_data or {}):
                old_str = str(device.extra_data)
                device.extra_data = extra
                record_device_change_sync(session, device.id, "extra_data", old_str, str(extra))

            session.add(device)
            polled += 1

        sync_link_traffic(session)
        session.commit()
    return {"polled": polled}


@celery_app.task(name="app.workers.discovery_tasks.run_scheduled_discovery")
def run_scheduled_discovery() -> dict:
    from app.config import settings

    from app.services.discovery_service import cycle_discovery_job_ids_if_needed

    if not settings.discovery_schedule_enabled or not settings.discovery_subnets_list:
        return {"scheduled": 0}

    started = 0
    with SyncSession() as session:
        cycle_discovery_job_ids_if_needed(session)
        for subnet in settings.discovery_subnets_list:
            job = DiscoveryJob(subnet=subnet, use_snmp=True, snmp_community=settings.snmp_community)
            session.add(job)
            session.flush()
            run_discovery_job.delay(job.id)
            started += 1
        session.commit()
    return {"scheduled": started}

"""Scan de rede via nmap (descoberta + portas/serviços/OS)."""

from __future__ import annotations

import logging
import os
import shutil
import subprocess
import tempfile
import time
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from collections.abc import Callable
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

from app.config import settings
from app.engines.discovery.discovery_progress import nmap_percent, nmap_range_percent
from app.engines.discovery.dns_resolver import iter_host_addresses
from app.engines.discovery.scan_options import ResolvedScanOptions, resolve_scan_options

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

ProgressCallback = Callable[[int, str], None]
CancelCallback = Callable[[], bool]


class ScanCancelledError(Exception):
    """Scan interrompido pelo usuário."""


class ScanTimeoutError(Exception):
    """Scan excedeu tempo máximo permitido."""


@dataclass
class NmapHost:
    ip_address: str
    hostname: str | None = None
    mac_address: str | None = None
    vendor: str | None = None
    os_name: str | None = None
    open_ports: list[dict] = field(default_factory=list)


@dataclass
class NmapScanResult:
    alive_hosts: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    hosts: dict[str, NmapHost] = field(default_factory=dict)
    total_hosts: int = 0
    errors: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)


def nmap_available() -> bool:
    return shutil.which(settings.nmap_path) is not None


def _format_elapsed(seconds: float) -> str:
    total = int(seconds)
    if total < 60:
        return f"{total}s"
    minutes, secs = divmod(total, 60)
    if minutes < 60:
        return f"{minutes}m {secs}s"
    hours, minutes = divmod(minutes, 60)
    return f"{hours}h {minutes}m"


def _common_nmap_args() -> list[str]:
    return [
        "-n",
        "--host-timeout",
        settings.nmap_host_timeout,
        "--max-retries",
        str(settings.nmap_max_retries),
    ]


def _parse_nmap_xml(xml_text: str) -> dict[str, NmapHost]:
    hosts: dict[str, NmapHost] = {}
    if not xml_text.strip():
        return hosts

    root = ET.fromstring(xml_text)
    for host_el in root.findall("host"):
        status = host_el.find("status")
        if status is not None and status.get("state") != "up":
            continue

        ip: str | None = None
        mac: str | None = None
        vendor: str | None = None
        for addr in host_el.findall("address"):
            if addr.get("addrtype") == "ipv4":
                ip = addr.get("addr")
            elif addr.get("addrtype") == "mac":
                mac = addr.get("addr")
                vendor = addr.get("vendor")

        if not ip:
            continue

        hostname: str | None = None
        hostnames = host_el.find("hostnames")
        if hostnames is not None:
            for hn in hostnames.findall("hostname"):
                name = hn.get("name")
                if name:
                    hostname = name
                    break

        os_name: str | None = None
        os_el = host_el.find("os")
        if os_el is not None:
            matches = os_el.findall("osmatch")
            if matches:
                os_name = matches[0].get("name")

        open_ports: list[dict] = []
        ports_el = host_el.find("ports")
        if ports_el is not None:
            for port_el in ports_el.findall("port"):
                state_el = port_el.find("state")
                if state_el is None or state_el.get("state") != "open":
                    continue
                service_el = port_el.find("service")
                open_ports.append(
                    {
                        "port": int(port_el.get("portid", 0)),
                        "protocol": port_el.get("protocol", "tcp"),
                        "service": service_el.get("name") if service_el is not None else None,
                        "product": service_el.get("product") if service_el is not None else None,
                        "version": service_el.get("version") if service_el is not None else None,
                    }
                )

        hosts[ip] = NmapHost(
            ip_address=ip,
            hostname=hostname,
            mac_address=mac,
            vendor=vendor,
            os_name=os_name,
            open_ports=open_ports,
        )

    return hosts


def _merge_hosts(result: NmapScanResult, parsed: dict[str, NmapHost]) -> None:
    for ip, host in parsed.items():
        base = result.hosts.get(ip)
        if base:
            base.hostname = host.hostname or base.hostname
            base.mac_address = host.mac_address or base.mac_address
            base.vendor = host.vendor or base.vendor
            base.os_name = host.os_name or base.os_name
            base.open_ports = host.open_ports or base.open_ports
        else:
            result.hosts[ip] = host
            if ip not in result.alive_hosts:
                result.alive_hosts.append(ip)


def _terminate_process(proc: subprocess.Popen[bytes]) -> None:
    proc.terminate()
    try:
        proc.wait(timeout=5)
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        proc.kill()
        proc.wait(timeout=5)


def _run_nmap(
    args: list[str],
    *,
    on_progress: ProgressCallback | None = None,
    should_cancel: CancelCallback | None = None,
    progress_start: int = 0,
    progress_end: int = 100,
    progress_label: str = "nmap",
    timeout_seconds: int | None = None,
) -> tuple[str, list[str]]:
    cmd = [settings.nmap_path, *args]
    errors: list[str] = []
    xml_chunks: list[str] = []

    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix=".xml", delete=False) as tmp:
        xml_path = tmp.name

    cmd.extend(["-oX", xml_path])

    try:
        proc = subprocess.Popen(
            cmd,
            stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,
            stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,
        )

        started = time.monotonic()
        last_heartbeat = 0.0
        span = max(progress_end - progress_start, 1)

        while proc.poll() is None:
            if should_cancel and should_cancel():
                _terminate_process(proc)
                raise ScanCancelledError("Scan cancelado pelo usuário")

            now = time.monotonic()
            elapsed = now - started

            if timeout_seconds is not None and elapsed > timeout_seconds:
                _terminate_process(proc)
                raise ScanTimeoutError(
                    f"{progress_label} excedeu {timeout_seconds}s (limite de tempo)"
                )

            heartbeat = settings.nmap_progress_heartbeat_seconds
            if on_progress and (now - last_heartbeat) >= heartbeat:
                last_heartbeat = now
                if timeout_seconds:
                    ratio = min(0.95, elapsed / timeout_seconds)
                else:
                    ratio = min(0.95, elapsed / 300)
                pct = progress_start + int(span * ratio)
                on_progress(
                    pct,
                    f"{progress_label} · {_format_elapsed(elapsed)}",
                )

            time.sleep(0.4)

        if proc.returncode not in (0, 1):
            errors.append(f"nmap exit code {proc.returncode}")

        with open(xml_path, encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as fh:
            xml_chunks.append(fh.read())
    finally:
        try:
            os.unlink(xml_path)
        except OSError:
            pass

    if on_progress:
        on_progress(progress_end, f"{progress_label} · concluído")

    return "".join(xml_chunks), errors


def _detail_scan_args(hosts: list[str], opts: ResolvedScanOptions, *, heavy: bool) -> list[str]:
    scan_flag = {"syn": "-sS", "connect": "-sT", "ack": "-sA"}.get(opts.scan_type, "-sS")
    args = [scan_flag, f"-T{opts.timing}", "--open", *_common_nmap_args()]

    if heavy and opts.service_detection:
        args.append("-sV")
    if heavy and opts.os_detection:
        args.append("-O")
    if heavy and opts.script_scan:
        args.append("-sC")

    if opts.port_range:
        args.extend(["-p", opts.port_range])
    elif opts.top_ports > 0:
        port_count = opts.top_ports if heavy else min(opts.top_ports, settings.nmap_light_top_ports)
        args.extend(["--top-ports", str(port_count)])

    args.extend(hosts)
    return args


def _udp_scan_args(hosts: list[str], opts: ResolvedScanOptions) -> list[str]:
    return [
        "-sU",
        f"-T{opts.timing}",
        "--open",
        "--top-ports",
        "100",
        *_common_nmap_args(),
        *hosts,
    ]


def _is_suspicious_alive_count(alive_count: int, total_hosts: int, opts: ResolvedScanOptions) -> bool:
    return (
        not opts.skip_suspicious_check
        and total_hosts >= 16
        and alive_count >= int(total_hosts * opts.suspicious_alive_ratio)
    )


def _resolve_alive_with_ping(
    cidr: str,
    nmap_alive: list[str],
    discovered: dict[str, NmapHost],
    result: NmapScanResult,
    opts: ResolvedScanOptions,
    *,
    on_progress: ProgressCallback | None,
    should_cancel: CancelCallback | None,
) -> list[str]:
    """Confirma hosts com ICMP; em rede suspeita faz ping em todo o /24."""
    import asyncio

    from app.engines.discovery.subnet_scanner import scan_subnet

    if not opts.ping_verify:
        return nmap_alive

    nmap_count = len(nmap_alive)

    def ping_progress(pct: int, label: str) -> None:
        if on_progress:
            mapped = nmap_percent(0.35 + 0.25 * (pct / 100))
            on_progress(mapped, label)

    if on_progress:
        on_progress(
            nmap_percent(0.35),
            f"Ping ICMP em {cidr} (confirmando hosts ativos)",
        )
    ping_result = asyncio.run(
        scan_subnet(
            cidr,
            batch_size=settings.discovery_batch_size,
            on_progress=ping_progress,
        )
    )
    verified = sorted(ping_result.alive_hosts)
    if nmap_count and len(verified) != nmap_count:
        result.errors.append(
            f"Ping ICMP: {len(verified)} ativos na sub-rede"
            + (f" (nmap reportou {nmap_count})" if nmap_count != len(verified) else "")
        )
    result.hosts = {
        ip: discovered.get(ip) or NmapHost(ip_address=ip)
        for ip in verified
    }
    return verified


def scan_subnet_nmap(
    cidr: str,
    *,
    scan_options: ResolvedScanOptions | None = None,
    on_progress: ProgressCallback | None = None,
    should_cancel: CancelCallback | None = None,
) -> NmapScanResult:
    """Scan nmap configurável: descoberta + portas/serviços/OS/scripts + UDP opcional."""
    opts = scan_options or resolve_scan_options(None)
    result = NmapScanResult(total_hosts=len(iter_host_addresses(cidr)))

    if not nmap_available():
        result.errors.append("nmap não encontrado no PATH")
        return result

    if should_cancel and should_cancel():
        raise ScanCancelledError("Scan cancelado pelo usuário")

    if on_progress:
        on_progress(0, f"nmap · descoberta ({opts.label}) em {cidr}")

    discover_args = [
        "-sn",
        f"-T{opts.timing}",
        "--min-rate",
        str(opts.min_rate),
        *_common_nmap_args(),
        cidr,
    ]
    xml_discover, err_discover = _run_nmap(
        discover_args,
        on_progress=on_progress,
        should_cancel=should_cancel,
        progress_start=0,
        progress_end=3,
        progress_label="nmap descoberta",
        timeout_seconds=opts.discover_timeout_seconds,
    )
    result.errors.extend(err_discover)

    if should_cancel and should_cancel():
        raise ScanCancelledError("Scan cancelado pelo usuário")

    discovered = _parse_nmap_xml(xml_discover)
    nmap_alive = sorted(discovered.keys())
    result.hosts.update(discovered)

    alive = _resolve_alive_with_ping(
        cidr,
        nmap_alive,
        discovered,
        result,
        opts,
        on_progress=on_progress,
        should_cancel=should_cancel,
    )
    result.alive_hosts = alive

    if should_cancel and should_cancel():
        raise ScanCancelledError("Scan cancelado pelo usuário")

    if not alive:
        if on_progress:
            on_progress(nmap_percent(1.0), "nmap · nenhum host ativo encontrado")
        return result

    if opts.discover_only or not opts.port_scan:
        if on_progress:
            on_progress(
                nmap_percent(1.0),
                f"nmap · {len(alive)} hosts · descoberta concluída (sem scan de portas)",
            )
        return result

    suspicious = _is_suspicious_alive_count(len(alive), result.total_hosts, opts)
    if suspicious:
        result.errors.append(
            f"Aviso: {len(alive)}/{result.total_hosts} hosts ativos após ping — "
            "scan de portas omitido, inventário em modo rápido"
        )
        if on_progress:
            on_progress(
                nmap_percent(1.0),
                f"nmap · {len(alive)} hosts · modo rápido (rede suspeita)",
            )
        return result

    heavy_detail = len(alive) <= opts.max_detail_hosts
    batch_size = max(1, opts.detail_batch_size)
    batches = [alive[i : i + batch_size] for i in range(0, len(alive), batch_size)]
    total_batches = len(batches)

    scan_mode = "portas/OS/scripts" if heavy_detail else "portas (rápido)"
    if opts.udp_scan:
        scan_mode += "+UDP"
    if on_progress:
        on_progress(
            nmap_percent(0.6),
            f"nmap · {len(alive)} hosts ativos · {scan_mode} · {total_batches} lote(s)",
        )

    detail_started = time.monotonic()
    for batch_idx, batch in enumerate(batches):
        if should_cancel and should_cancel():
            raise ScanCancelledError("Scan cancelado pelo usuário")

        elapsed_total = time.monotonic() - detail_started
        if elapsed_total > opts.detail_total_timeout_seconds:
            raise ScanTimeoutError(
                f"Scan de portas excedeu {opts.detail_total_timeout_seconds}s no total"
            )

        pct_start = nmap_range_percent(0.6, 1.0, batch_idx / total_batches)
        pct_end = nmap_range_percent(0.6, 1.0, (batch_idx + 1) / tot

"""Perfis e opções configuráveis do scan nmap/SNMP (API + frontend)."""

from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Any, Literal

from app.config import settings

ScanProfile = Literal["quick", "standard", "deep", "aggressive", "custom"]
ScanType = Literal["syn", "connect", "ack"]


@dataclass
class ScanOptions:
    profile: ScanProfile = "standard"

    discover_only: bool | None = None
    port_scan: bool | None = None
    scan_type: ScanType = "syn"
    service_detection: bool | None = None
    os_detection: bool | None = None
    script_scan: bool | None = None
    udp_scan: bool | None = None

    top_ports: int | None = None
    port_range: str | None = None
    timing: int | None = None
    min_rate: int | None = None

    max_detail_hosts: int | None = None
    max_inventory_hosts: int | None = None
    detail_batch_size: int | None = None
    skip_suspicious_check: bool | None = None
    suspicious_alive_ratio: float | None = None

    use_snmp: bool | None = None
    snmp_community: str | None = None
    fast_inventory: bool | None = None
    mark_missing_inactive: bool | None = None
    ping_verify: bool | None = None
    inventory_full_subnet: bool | None = None

    discover_timeout_seconds: int | None = None
    detail_batch_timeout_seconds: int | None = None
    detail_total_timeout_seconds: int | None = None
    host_enrich_timeout_seconds: float | None = None
    inventory_timeout_seconds: int | None = None

    @classmethod
    def from_dict(cls, data: dict[str, Any] | None) -> ScanOptions:
        if not data:
            return cls()
        known = {f.name for f in cls.__dataclass_fields__.values()}  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
        return cls(**{k: v for k, v in data.items() if k in known})

    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        from dataclasses import asdict

        return asdict(self)


@dataclass
class ResolvedScanOptions:
    profile: ScanProfile
    discover_only: bool
    port_scan: bool
    scan_type: ScanType
    service_detection: bool
    os_detection: bool
    script_scan: bool
    udp_scan: bool
    top_ports: int
    port_range: str | None
    timing: int
    min_rate: int
    max_detail_hosts: int
    max_inventory_hosts: int
    detail_batch_size: int
    skip_suspicious_check: bool
    suspicious_alive_ratio: float
    use_snmp: bool
    snmp_community: str | None
    fast_inventory: bool | None
    mark_missing_inactive: bool
    ping_verify: bool
    inventory_full_subnet: bool
    discover_timeout_seconds: int
    detail_batch_timeout_seconds: int
    detail_total_timeout_seconds: int
    host_enrich_timeout_seconds: float
    inventory_timeout_seconds: int
    label: str = field(default="")


PROFILE_META: dict[str, dict[str, str]] = {
    "quick": {
        "label": "Rápido",
        "description": "Descoberta de hosts (-sn) e inventário leve. Sem scan de portas.",
    },
    "standard": {
        "label": "Padrão",
        "description": "Descoberta + portas SYN, serviços/OS em redes pequenas, SNMP completo.",
    },
    "deep": {
        "label": "Profundo",
        "description": "Top 1000 portas, detecção de serviço, OS e scripts NSE (-sC).",
    },
    "aggressive": {
        "label": "Agressivo",
        "description": "Máxima cobertura: ignora limite de rede suspeita, mais hosts, timing alto.",
    },
    "custom": {
        "label": "Personalizado",
        "description": "Configure cada opção manualmente.",
    },
}


def _profile_defaults(profile: ScanProfile) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if profile == "quick":
        return {
            "discover_only": True,
            "port_scan": False,
            "service_detection": False,
            "os_detection": False,
            "script_scan": False,
            "udp_scan": False,
            "use_snmp": False,
            "fast_inventory": True,
            "mark_missing_inactive": False,
            "timing": 4,
            "top_ports": 0,
            "max_detail_hosts": 0,
            "max_inventory_hosts": 64,
        }
    if profile == "standard":
        return {
            "discover_only": False,
            "port_scan": True,
            "service_detection": True,
            "os_detection": True,
            "script_scan": False,
            "udp_scan": False,
            "timing": 4,
            "top_ports": settings.nmap_top_ports,
            "max_detail_hosts": settings.nmap_detail_max_hosts,
            "max_inventory_hosts": 256,
            "ping_verify": True,
            "inventory_full_subnet": True,
            "fast_inventory": None,
        }
    if profile == "deep":
        return {
            "discover_only": False,
            "port_scan": True,
            "service_detection": True,
            "os_detection": True,
            "script_scan": True,
            "udp_scan": False,
            "timing": 3,
            "top_ports": 1000,
            "max_detail_hosts": 128,
            "max_inventory_hosts": 256,
            "ping_verify": True,
            "inventory_full_subnet": True,
            "detail_batch_size": 8,
            "fast_inventory": False,
            "discover_timeout_seconds": 300,
            "detail_total_timeout_seconds": 1800,
        }
    if profile == "aggressive":
        return {
            "discover_only": False,
            "port_scan": True,
            "service_detection": True,
            "os_detection": True,
            "script_scan": True,
            "udp_scan": True,
            "timing": 4,
            "min_rate": 1000,
            "top_ports": 1000,
            "max_detail_hosts": 256,
            "max_inventory_hosts": 256,
            "ping_verify": True,
            "detail_batch_size": 12,
            "skip_suspicious_check": True,
            "fast_inventory": False,
            "discover_timeout_seconds": 300,
            "detail_total_timeout_seconds": 3600,
            "inventory_timeout_seconds": 1800,
        }
    return {}


def resolve_scan_options(
    options: ScanOptions | dict[str, Any] | None,
    *,
    snmp_community_fallback: str | None = None,
) -> ResolvedScanOptions:
    opts = options if isinstance(options, ScanOptions) else ScanOptions.from_dict(options)
    base = _profile_defaults(opts.profile)

    def pick(key: str, default: Any) -> Any:
        custom = getattr(opts, key)
        if opts.profile == "custom":
            return default if custom is None else custom
        if custom is not None:
            return custom
        if key in base:
            return base[key]
        return default

    profile = opts.profile
    discover_only = pick("discover_only", False)
    port_scan = pick("port_scan", True) and not discover_only
    top_ports = int(pick("top_ports", settings.nmap_top_ports))
    heavy_default = top_ports >= settings.nmap_top_ports

    resolved = ResolvedScanOptions(
        profile=profile,
        discover_only=discover_only,
        port_scan=port_scan,
        scan_type=pick("scan_type", "syn"),
        service_detection=bool(pick("service_detection", heavy_default)),
        os_detection=bool(pick("os_detection", heavy_default)),
        script_scan=bool(pick("script_scan", False)),
        udp_scan=bool(pick("udp_scan", False)),
        top_ports=top_ports if port_scan else 0,
        port_range=opts.port_range,
        timing=max(0, min(5, int(pick("timing", 4)))),
        min_rate=int(pick("min_rate", settings.nmap_min_rate)),
        max_detail_hosts=int(pick("max_detail_hosts", settings.nmap_detail_max_hosts)),
        max_inventory_hosts=int(pick("max_inventory_hosts", settings.discovery_max_inventory_hosts)),
        detail_batch_size=int(pick("detail_batch_size", settings.nmap_detail_batch_size)),
        skip_suspicious_check=bool(pick("skip_suspicious_check", False)),
        suspicious_alive_ratio=float(
            pick("suspicious_alive_ratio", settings.discovery_suspicious_alive_ratio)
        ),
        use_snmp=bool(pick("use_snmp", True)),
        snmp_community=opts.snmp_community or snmp_community_fallback,
        fast_inventory=pick("fast_inventory", None),
        mark_missing_inactive=bool(pick("mark_missing_inactive", True)),
        ping_verify=bool(pick("ping_verify", settings.discovery_ping_verify)),
        inventory_full_subnet=bool(pick("inventory_full_subnet", True)),
        discover_timeout_seconds=int(pick("discover_timeout_seconds", settings.nmap_discover_timeout_seconds)),
        detail_batch_timeout_seconds=int(
            pick("detail_batch_timeout_seconds", settings.nmap_detail_batch_timeout_seconds)
        ),
        detail_total_timeout_seconds=int(
            pick("detail_total_timeout_seconds", settings.nmap_detail_total_timeout_seconds)
        ),
        host_enrich_timeout_seconds=float(
            pick("host_enrich_timeout_seconds", settings.discovery_host_enrich_timeout_seconds)
        ),
        inventory_timeout_seconds=int(
            pick("inventory_timeout_seconds", settings.discovery_inventory_timeout_seconds)
        ),
    )

    meta = PROFILE_META.get(profile, PROFILE_META["custom"])
    resolved.label = meta["label"]
    return resolved


def list_scan_profiles() -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    return [
        {
            "id": profile_id,
            "label": meta["label"],
            "description": meta["description"],
            "defaults": _profile_defaults(profile_id),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
        }
        for profile_id, meta in PROFILE_META.items()
        if profile_id != "custom"
    ]


def list_scan_defaults() -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {
        "profiles": list_scan_profiles(),
        "limits": {
            "top_ports": {"min": 10, "max": 65535, "default": settings.nmap_top_ports},
            "timing": {"min": 0, "max": 5, "default": 4},
            "max_inventory_hosts": {"min": 1, "max": 512, "default": settings.discovery_max_inventory_hosts},
            "max_detail_hosts": {"min": 1, "max": 512, "default": settings.nmap_detail_max_hosts},
        },
        "scan_types": [
            {"id": "syn", "label": "SYN (-sS)", "description": "Stealth SYN scan (requer privilégios)"},
            {"id": "connect", "label": "Connect (-sT)", "description": "TCP connect scan (sem root)"},
            {"id": "ack", "label": "ACK (-sA)", "description": "ACK scan para firewall mapping"},
        ],
    }

import asyncio
from collections.abc import Callable
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

from icmplib import async_multiping

from app.config import settings
from app.engines.discovery.dns_resolver import iter_host_addresses

ProgressCallback = Callable[[int, str], None]


@dataclass
class ScanResult:
    alive_hosts: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    total_hosts: int = 0
    errors: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)


async def ping_batch(hosts: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    if not hosts:
        return []

    try:
        results = await async_multiping(
            hosts,
            count=1,
            timeout=settings.ping_timeout_seconds,
            privileged=False,
        )
        return [result.address for result in results if result.is_alive]
    except Exception:
        return []


async def ping_hosts(
    hosts: list[str],
    *,
    batch_size: int | None = None,
    on_progress: ProgressCallback | None = None,
) -> list[str]:
    """Confirma hosts vivos via ICMP (filtra falsos positivos do nmap)."""
    if not hosts:
        return []

    batch_size = batch_size or settings.discovery_batch_size
    alive: list[str] = []
    total_batches = max(1, (len(hosts) + batch_size - 1) // batch_size)

    for batch_num, index in enumerate(range(0, len(hosts), batch_size)):
        batch = hosts[index : index + batch_size]
        alive.extend(await ping_batch(batch))
        if on_progress:
            pct = int(100 * (batch_num + 1) / total_batches)
            on_progress(
                pct,
                f"Ping {batch_num + 1}/{total_batches} · {len(alive)} confirmados",
            )
        await asyncio.sleep(0.02)

    return alive


async def scan_subnet(
    cidr: str,
    batch_size: int = 64,
    on_progress: ProgressCallback | None = None,
) -> ScanResult:
    hosts = iter_host_addresses(cidr)
    result = ScanResult(total_hosts=len(hosts))
    total_batches = max(1, (len(hosts) + batch_size - 1) // batch_size)

    if on_progress:
        on_progress(5, f"Ping 0/{total_batches} · {result.total_hosts} hosts na sub-rede")

    for batch_num, index in enumerate(range(0, len(hosts), batch_size)):
        batch = hosts[index : index + batch_size]
        try:
            alive = await ping_batch(batch)
            result.alive_hosts.extend(alive)
        except Exception as exc:
            result.errors.append(str(exc))

        if on_progress:
            pct = 5 + int(40 * (batch_num + 1) / total_batches)
            on_progress(
                pct,
                f"Ping {batch_num + 1}/{total_batches} · {len(result.alive_hosts)} ativos",
            )
        await asyncio.sleep(0.05)

    return result

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
import re

from pysnmp.hlapi import (
    CommunityData,
    ContextData,
    ObjectIdentity,
    ObjectType,
    SnmpEngine,
    UdpTransportTarget,
    getCmd,
    nextCmd,
)

from app.config import settings

SYS_NAME = "1.3.6.1.2.1.1.5.0"
SYS_DESCR = "1.3.6.1.2.1.1.1.0"
SYS_LOCATION = "1.3.6.1.2.1.1.6.0"
SYS_UPTIME = "1.3.6.1.2.1.1.3.0"
IF_NUMBER = "1.3.6.1.2.1.2.1.0"
HR_PROCESSOR_LOAD = "1.3.6.1.2.1.25.3.3.1.2"


IF_PHYS_ADDRESS = "1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.6"

VENDOR_HINTS: tuple[tuple[str, str], ...] = (
    ("cisco ios", "Cisco"),
    ("cisco", "Cisco"),
    ("juniper", "Juniper"),
    ("junos", "Juniper"),
    ("mikrotik", "MikroTik"),
    ("routeros", "MikroTik"),
    ("hewlett-packard", "HP"),
    ("hp ethernet", "HP"),
    ("hp laserjet", "HP"),
    ("hp ", "HP"),
    ("dell", "Dell"),
    ("ubiquiti", "Ubiquiti"),
    ("unifi", "Ubiquiti"),
    ("aruba", "Aruba"),
    ("fortinet", "Fortinet"),
    ("fortigate", "Fortinet"),
    ("palo alto", "Palo Alto"),
    ("linux", "Linux"),
    ("ubuntu", "Ubuntu"),
    ("windows", "Microsoft"),
    ("vmware", "VMware"),
    ("synology", "Synology"),
    ("qnap", "QNAP"),
    ("canon", "Canon"),
    ("xerox", "Xerox"),
    ("brother", "Brother"),
    ("epson", "Epson"),
    ("hikvision", "Hikvision"),
    ("dahua", "Dahua"),
    ("axis", "Axis"),
)


@dataclass
class SnmpDeviceInfo:
    sys_name: str | None = None
    sys_descr: str | None = None
    sys_location: str | None = None
    sys_uptime: str | None = None
    vendor: str | None = None
    model: str | None = None
    mac_address: str | None = None
    interface_count: int | None = None
    cpu_load: float | None = None
    cpu_loads: list[float] = field(default_factory=list)
    interfaces: list[dict] = field(default_factory=list)
    reachable: bool = False
    error: str | None = None


def _snmp_get(host: str, oid: str, community: str | None = None) -> str | None:
    community = community or settings.snmp_community
    iterator = getCmd(
        SnmpEngine(),
        CommunityData(community, mpModel=1),
        UdpTransportTarget((host, settings.snmp_port), timeout=settings.snmp_timeout_seconds, retries=1),
        ContextData(),
        ObjectType(ObjectIdentity(oid)),
    )
    error_indication, error_status, _, var_binds = next(iterator)
    if error_indication or error_status:
        return None
    return str(var_binds[0][1])


def _snmp_walk(host: str, oid: str, community: str | None = None, limit: int = 32) -> list[str]:
    community = community or settings.snmp_community
    values: list[str] = []
    iterator = nextCmd(
        SnmpEngine(),
        CommunityData(community, mpModel=1),
        UdpTransportTarget((host, settings.snmp_port), timeout=settings.snmp_timeout_seconds, retries=1),
        ContextData(),
        ObjectType(ObjectIdentity(oid)),
        lexicographicMode=False,
    )
    for error_indication, error_status, _, var_binds in iterator:
        if error_indication or error_status:
            break
        values.append(str(var_binds[0][1]))
        if len(values) >= limit:
            break
    return values


def infer_device_type(sys_descr: str | None) -> str | None:
    if not sys_descr:
        return None
    descr = sys_descr.lower()
    if any(word in descr for word in ("router", "ios xe", "junos", "mikrotik routeros")):
        return "router"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("switch", "catalyst", "procurve")):
        return "switch"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("access point", "unifi ap", "aironet")):
        return "access_point"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("printer", "laserjet", "canon", "hp print", "xerox")):
        return "printer"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("camera", "ip cam", "hikvision", "dahua", "axis cam")):
        return "camera"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("television", "smart tv", "samsung tv", "lg webos")):
        return "tv"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("turnstile", "catraca", "access control", "reader")):
        return "turnstile"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("infusion", "syringe pump", "bomba")):
        return "infusion_pump"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("ventilator", "respirator", "ventilador")):
        return "ventilator"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("patient monitor", "multiparametric", "monitor cl")):
        return "clinical_monitor"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("hl7", "dicom", "medical gateway")):
        return "hl7_gateway"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("medical", "hospital", "clinical", "philips healthcare", "ge healthcare")):
        return "medical_device"
    if any(word in descr for word in ("linux", "ubuntu", "centos", "windows", "server")):
        return "server"
    if "vmware" in descr:
        return "vm"
    return "network_device"


def parse_sys_descr(sys_descr: str | None) -> tuple[str | None, str | None]:
    if not sys_descr:
        return None, None

    lower = sys_descr.lower()
    vendor: str | None = None
    for hint, name in VENDOR_HINTS:
        if hint in lower:
            vendor = name
            break

    model: str | None = None
    cisco_model = re.search(r"\(([A-Z0-9][A-Z0-9\-_]+(?:K9|M)?)\)", sys_descr)
    if cisco_model:
        model = cisco_model.group(1)
    if not model:
        mikrotik_model = re.search(r"routeros[^)]*\)\s+(\S+)", sys_descr, re.IGNORECASE)
        if mikrotik_model:
            model = mikrotik_model.group(1)
    if not model:
        hp_model = re.search(r"HP[^\n,]*?([A-Z]{1,3}\d{3,}[A-Z0-9\-]*)", sys_descr, re.IGNORECASE)
        if hp_model:
            model = hp_model.group(1)
    if not model:
        generic = re.search(r"(?:model|prod|product)[:\s]+([^\s,;]+)", sys_descr, re.IGNORECASE)
        if generic:
            model = generic.group(1)

    return vendor, model


def format_mac_address(raw) -> str | None:
    if raw is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(raw, (bytes, bytearray)):
        if len(raw) != 6 or not any(b for b in raw):
            return None
        return ":".join(f"{b:02X}" for b in raw)

    text = str(raw).strip().upper()
    if not text or text in {"00:00:00:00:00:00", "0:0:0:0:0:0"}:
        return None

    hex_only = re.sub(r"[^0-9A-F]", "", text)
    if len(hex_only) == 12:
        return ":".join(hex_only[i : i + 2] for i in range(0, 12, 2))

    normalized = text.replace("-", ":")
    if re.fullmatch(r"([0-9A-F]{2}:){5}[0-9A-F]{2}", normalized):
        return normalized
    return None


def _collect_mac_address(host: str, community: str) -> str | None:
    for raw in _snmp_walk(host, IF_PHYS_ADDRESS, community, limit=32):
        mac = format_mac_address(raw)
        if mac:
            return mac
    return None


def collect_snmp_info(host: str, community: str | None = None) -> SnmpDeviceInfo:
    communities = [community] if community else settings.snmp_communities_list
    last_error: str | None = None

    for candidate in communities:
        info = _collect_snmp_info_with_community(host, candidate)
        if info.reachable:
            return info
        last_error = info.error

    fallback = SnmpDeviceInfo()
    fallback.error = last_error or "SNMP unreachable or community invalid"
    return fallback


def _collect_snmp_info_with_community(host: str, community: str) -> SnmpDeviceInfo:
    info = SnmpDeviceInfo()
    community = community or settings.snmp_community

    try:
        sys_name = _snmp_get(host, SYS_NAME, community)
        if sys_name is None:
            info.error = "SNMP unreachable or community invalid"
            return info

        info.reachable = True
        info.sys_name = sys_name
        info.sys_descr = _snmp_get(host, SYS_DESCR, community)
        info.sys_location = _snmp_get(host, SYS_LOCATION, community)
        info.sys_uptime = _snmp_get(host, SYS_UPTIME, community)
        info.vendor, info.model = parse_sys_descr(info.sys_descr)
        info.mac_address = _collect_mac_address(host, community)

        if if_number := _snmp_get(host, IF_NUMBER, community):
            if if_number.isdigit():
                info.interface_count = int(if_number)

        cpu_values = _snmp_walk(host, HR_PROCESSOR_LOAD, community, limit=16)
        info.cpu_loads = [float(value) for value in cpu_values if value.isdigit() or _is_float(value)]
        if info.cpu_loads:
            info.cpu_load = round(sum(info.cpu_loads) / len(info.cpu_loads), 2)

        info.interfaces = _collect_interfaces(host, community)
    except Exception as exc:
        info.error = str(exc)

    return info


def _is_float(value: str) -> bool:
    try:
        float(value)
        return True
    except ValueError:
        return False


def snmp_walk(host: str, oid: str, community: str | None = None, limit: int = 32) -> list[str]:
    return _snmp_walk(host, oid, community, limit)


def _collect_interfaces(host: str, community: str) -> list[dict]:
    names = _snmp_walk(host, "1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.2", community, limit=32)
    statuses = _snmp_walk(host, "1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.8", community, limit=32)
    in_octets = _snmp_walk(host, "1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.10", community, limit=32)
    out_octets = _snmp_walk(host, "1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.16", community, limit=32)
    speeds = _snmp_walk(host, "1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.5", community, limit=32)
    interfaces: list[dict] = []

    status_map = {"1": "up", "2": "down", "3": "testing"}
    for index, name in enumerate(names):
        status_raw = statuses[index] if index < len(statuses) else "unknown"
        in_raw = in_octets[index] if index < len(in_octets) else "0"
        out_raw = out_octets[index] if index < len(out_octets) else "0"
        speed_raw = speeds[index] if index < len(speeds) else "0"
        interfaces.append(
            {
                "name": name,
                "status": status_map.get(status_raw, status_raw),
                "index": index + 1,
                "in_octets": int(in_raw) if in_raw.isdigit() else 0,
                "out_octets": int(out_raw) if out_raw.isdigit() else 0,
                "speed_bps": int(speed_raw) if speed_raw.isdigit() else 0,
            }
        )
    return interfaces

from sqlalchemy import select
